payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_a3bdbaad7c764c009513a064', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import csv\\nimport random\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\n\\n# Set seed for reproducibility\\nrandom.seed(42)\\n\\n# Configuration\\nNUM_ROWS = 100\\nPRODUCTS = [\\"Widget A\\", \\"Gadget B\\", \\"Tool C\\", \\"Device D\\", \\"Item E\\"]\\nSTART_DATE = datetime(2024, 1, 1)\\nEND_DATE = datetime(2024, 12, 31)\\nDATE_RANGE = (END_DATE - START_DATE).days\\n\\ndef random_date():\\n    random_days = random.randint(0, DATE_RANGE)\\n    return (START_DATE + timedelta(days=random_days)).strftime(\\"%Y-%m-%d\\")\\n\\ndef random_price():\\n    return round(random.uniform(10.00, 500.00), 2)\\n\\ndef random_quantity():\\n    return random.randint(1, 20)\\n\\n# Generate and write CSV\\nwith open(\'sales_data.csv\', \'w\', newline=\'\') as f:\\n    writer = csv.writer(f)\\n    writer.writerow([\'Date\', \'Product\', \'Price\', \'Quantity\'])\\n    \\n    for _ in range(NUM_ROWS):\\n        writer.writerow([\\n            random_date(),\\n            random.choice(PRODUCTS),\\n            random_price(),\\n            random_quantity()\\n        ])\\n\\nprint(f\\"Generated sales_data.csv with {NUM_ROWS} rows\\")", "filename": "generator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
